title: Adventurer Swordsman
promptSummary: 2D pixel-art side-view adventurer swordsman, neutral idle-ready pose for future sprite sheet animation.
notes: 기본 검사형 캐릭터. 검과 망토가 분리되어 idle, walk, attack 실험에 적합함.

title: Desert Scout Archer
promptSummary: 2D pixel-art side-view desert scout archer, neutral idle-ready pose for future sprite sheet animation.
notes: 활과 후드 실루엣을 가진 정찰병. 달리기와 사격 모션 테스트용.

title: Forest Herbalist Mage
promptSummary: 2D pixel-art side-view forest herbalist mage, neutral idle-ready pose for future sprite sheet animation.
notes: 로브, 가방, 지팡이 보조 움직임을 테스트하기 좋은 마법사형 캐릭터.

title: Mechanical Tinkerer Engineer

title: Armored Shield Guard

title: Nimble Rogue Thief
